description_long: This is a large, freestanding advertising board featuring a prominent Pepsi advertisement for Super Bowl LIII. The board consists of a wide rectangular display panel mounted atop a thick, cylindrical pole, with a stepped platform structure beneath the sign. The front face displays a vibrant blue background with a large Pepsi can and bold white text, while the rear and sides are plain and unadorned. The supporting structure appears robust, likely made of metal, and is designed to withstand outdoor urban conditions. The display panel is bordered by a simple, thick frame, and the overall construction suggests durability and stability. There are no visible illumination features or interactive components on the board.
description: A large, freestanding advertising board with a Pepsi Super Bowl LIII ad on a blue background, mounted on a thick pole with a stepped platform beneath. The structure is robust and designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pepsi Super Bowl LIII advertisement with a blue background and bold text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the display panel and the stepped platform structure beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back of the board and the supporting pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness of the display and the stepped platform.
attribute_frame_design: thick, solid frame with rectangular shape and no decorative elements
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for a beverage brand (Pepsi Super Bowl LIII)
